message:
feat(test-logging): add v2-only schema enforcement and validation (DISC-021 / bd-38m8w)

New test code must use pi.test.log.v2 schema — the v1 log schema is
deprecated. This commit adds enforcement functions and comprehensive
test coverage to prevent accidental use of v1 in new tests while
preserving backward compatibility for grandfathered data.

tests/common/logging.rs:
- Add validate_jsonl_line_v2_only() that runs standard validation then
  rejects pi.test.log.v1 schema records with a clear deprecation error
- Add validate_jsonl_v2_only() batch variant for full JSONL content
- Note: pi.test.artifact.v1 is the current artifact schema and is NOT
  rejected (only log v1 is deprecated)
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] on build_log_record
- Add 5 unit tests: v1 rejection, v2 acceptance, artifact v1 passthrough,
  mixed batch detection, and TestLogger compliance proof

tests/validate_e2e_artifact_schema.rs:
- Import new v2-only validation functions
- Add section 14 with 7 integration tests covering v2-only enforcement:
  v1 rejection, v2 acceptance, artifact v1 passthrough, TestHarness
  compliance, batch enforcement, and backward compatibility proof
- Renumber existing artifact-index tests to section 15
- Apply rustfmt to validate_artifact_index_paths() call sites

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
